summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Advanced Technical Projects section redesign. All features verified working correctly.

issues: No skip button available - boot sequence runs automatically for ~5-10 seconds. Consider adding a skip button for returning users.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor console warning: 'Received `%s` for a non-boolean attribute `%s`' - likely from Switch component passing 'true' as jsx attribute
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio is frontend-only with mock data from /app/frontend/src/mock.js. Boot sequence takes ~5-10 seconds to complete automatically. All Advanced Projects section features working: 7 project cards in 2-column grid, expand/collapse, color-coded category badges, header stats (7 projects, 6 categories, 2 expert-level, 4 enterprise), sidebar navigation to 'Tech Projects'.
